privileged_info_summary: All papers in the required_pairs metadata are real, published academic papers. 'Attention Is All You Need' (Vaswani et al., NeurIPS 2017) introduces the Transformer architecture. 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding' (Devlin et al., NAACL 2019) builds on Transformer technology. 'Language Models are Few-Shot Learners' (Brown et al., NeurIPS 2020, GPT-3) demonstrates few-shot learning with large language models. 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks' (Krizhevsky et al., NeurIPS 2012, AlexNet) is a seminal CNN paper. 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' (He et al., CVPR 2016, ResNet) introduces residual networks for deep learning. 'Generative Adversarial Nets' (Goodfellow et al., NeurIPS 2014) proposes the GAN framework. 'Deep Learning' (LeCun, Bengio, Hinton, Nature 2015) is a comprehensive review article. All papers are seeded into the Zotero database (18 papers total: 10 classic papers + 8 ML papers) using the seed_library.py script before task execution. The data is not synthetic but real papers, though the Zotero library instance is freshly created for the task.
